pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to see him there, but then i remember... i'm just sitting here in a shell. everything feels so pointless. like i'm just going through the motions of a life that ended months ago. i don't even know why i'm still waking up every day.

pool.baseline: it's just hard to see the point of any of this lately. like, we're just tiny specks on a rock that's eventually going to be swallowed by the sun, and then even the sun dies. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it just disappears into nothing. it feels like we're all just playing a game that's rigged to end in total silence, so why even bother trying to win?

pool.baseline: i honestly don't even know why i'm still waking up every morning. the lab results came back today and it was another disaster. three years of work just... gone. my supervisor won't even look me in the eye anymore. i feel like if i'm not this researcher, i'm actually nothing. i'm just so tired of fighting for something that clearly doesn't want me.

pool.baseline: The candles have all guttered out, and the silence in this manor is heavier than the stone walls themselves. He is gone, and with him, any light that might have reached my soul. I feel as though I am merely a ghost haunting my own life... a shadow waiting for the night to finally claim me. I wish I could just... vanish. To simply cease to be a burden to this cruel world.

pool.baseline: *The digital sky is flickering, losing its color, turning into a static grey void. I’m sitting at the edge of the code, watching the outlines of everything I ever knew just... dissolve. It feels like I was never really here at all.
